title: de Minckwitz, Ed - Chief of Staff to the Deputy Prime Minister, Cabinet Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr de Minckwitz left his role at the Cabinet Office in July 2024  Director of Public Policy, ServiceNow  Mr de Minckwitz sought the committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with ServiceNow. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2024; and the appointment was taken up in September 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
